settings.heading: Nutrition for Horses That Look and Perform  Their Best.
settings.subheading: Give your horse trusted, evidence-based nutritional support  designed to help you stop guessing and start seeing results.

settings.text: Evidence-based formulas developed by equine nutrition experts and trusted by discerning horse owners.

settings.heading: Horse owners shouldn’t have to guess when it comes to nutrition.
settings.description: The supplement market is filled with false claims, confusing labels, and products that promise results but never deliver. That leaves horse owners frustrated, second-guessing their choices, and wondering whether their horse is really getting what it needs.
settings.highlight_text: Core Balance offers a more refined approach: complete, evidence-based nutrition designed to support your horse without the necessary complexity.
settings.highlight_subtext: - TRUE RESULTS COME FROM THE RIGHT BALANCE—NOT MORE PRODUCTS.

settings.title: A more complete approach to equine nutrition.
settings.text: If you have ever felt frustrated or confused about what to feed your horse, you are not alone. Core Balance was built to give horse owners supplements they can trust—developed with equine nutrition expertise and trusted by serious horse owners and competitors.
settings.desc_2: Trusted by horse owners, breeders, trainers, and competitors

settings.title: Find the right formula
settings.description: Browse Core Balance and learn which supplement best fits your horse’s needs.

settings.title: Feed Core Balance
settings.description: Select the Core Balance formula that supports your horse’s nutrition and feed it consistently.

settings.title: See the difference
settings.description: Look for visible improvements like a healthier coat, stronger hooves, and a horse that looks and feels its best.

settings.heading: A simple way to get started

settings.title: When nutrition is right, it shows

settings.text:
With the right nutritional support, you can see the difference in your horse—and feel more confident in what you feed every day.

  • A healthier coat and better overall appearance
  • Stronger hooves and improved condition
  • Support for wellness, strength, and performance
  • Greater confidence that your horse is getting what it needs

settings.title: Quick Results
settings.description: I noticed results almost immediately, his top line and his muscle tone have improved at only 2 weeks of the supplement. We are excited to see how he will look in 2-3 months. - Anna T.

settings.title: Has kept my MFM horse sound and happy
settings.description: I consider this supplement the cornerstone in my horses MFM protocol. He has remained sound, happy, healthy and able to get back to work. - Bobbi K.

settings.title: Noticeable difference within 3 weeks!
settings.description: My mare always struggled to put muscle on even under rigorous training and showing (1.30 jumpers).  - Christy J.

settings.text: Stop wasting money on supplements that promise results but never deliver. Find the Core Balance formula that helps you support your horse with trusted nutrition and visible results.
